titleStmt.title: SII 5.518: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 518. (A.R. No. 219 of 1894). ON THE BASE OF THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
� . svasti śrī .�The puḷḷi is marked in this inscription by a vertical stroke.tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyun taṉakke yurimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kān=ta ḷūrccālai kalamaruttaruḷi veṅkaiñāṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyun taṭikaipāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamun tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉneḻil vaḷaruḻiyu ḷellāyāṇṭun toḻutaka viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarai t tecukoḷa śrīkovirājakesarivarmma rāṉa śrīrājarājade varkku yā
ṇṭu Irupattoṉṟāvatu Irājentiraciṅkavaḷaṉāṭṭup poykai nāṭṭut tevatāṉam tiruvai yāṟṟu Iṉitiruntaruḷiṉa tiripuvaṉacaṇ� ttevakanmi kaḷom viṟṟukkuṭutta nilavilaiyāvaṇam śrīrājarāja tevar nampirāṭṭiyār tanticattiviṭaṅkiyārāṉa Olokamahāde viyār tiruvai yāṟṟi leṭuppittaruḷiṉa Olokamahādeviśva rattu mahāde varkanmi kaḷukku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyār śrīkoyiliṟ periyapuṟat tiruccuṟṟālaiyil vaṭakiḻ mulaiyilniṉṟuñ cevvey vaṭakku
nokki nāṟkoltiruviḻāviti viṭṭu nāṭṭiṉa puḷḷaṭikkalliniṉṟun teṉṉellai meṟkku nokki muppatteṇko lācaṟutiyiṟ tiru riyapuṟattikālaiyiṉ vaṭamel mulaiyiṉiṉṟum cevvey vaṭakkunokki Iraṇṭe yaraikkāṟkol tiruviḻāviti viṭṭu nāṭṭiṉa puḷḷaṭikkalle yuṟṟu Itaniṉṟu melellai cevvey vaṭakku nokki patiṉmuṉṟe kāṟkol ceṉṟa Iṭattu nāṭṭiṉa puḷḷaṭikkalle yuṟṟu Itaniṉṟuñ cevvey meṟkku nokki patiṉorukol ceṉṟu
tiruvai yāṟuṭaiyār tiruviḻāppuṟa nilattiṟ kiḻai varampil nāṭṭiṉa puḷḷaṭikkalle yuṟṟu Itaniṉṟuñ cevvey vaṭakku lai kiḻakku nokkic cevvey Aimpattoṉpatiṉko lācaṟutiyil nāṭṭiṉa puḷḷaṭikkalle yuṟṟu Itaniṉṟum cevvey vaṭakku nokki nāṟko lācaṟutiyil nāṭṭiṉapuḷḷaṭikkalle yuṟṟu Itaṉiṉṟuñ cevvey kiḻakku nokki Eḻupa
tiṉkol ceṉṟu nāṭṭiṉa puḷḷaṭikkalle yuṟṟu Itaniṉṟuñ cevvey teṟku nokki nāṟko lācaṟutiyil nāṭṭi ceṉṟu nāṭaṭiṉa puḷḷaṭikkalle yuṟṟu Itaniṉṟuñ cevvey vaṭakku nokki Irupatiṉkol ceṉṟu nāṭṭiṉa puḷḷaṭikkalle yuṟṟu Itaniṉṟuñ cevvey kiḻakku nokki muppattaṟukol ceṉṟa vaṭakiḻmulai yācaṟutiyil nāṭṭiṉa puḷḷaṭikkalle
yuṟṟu Itaniṉṟuṅ kiḻellai cevvey teṟkku nokki Irupatteṇkolācaṟutiyila nāṭṭiṉa puḷḷaṭikkalle yuṟṟu vve teṟku ṉokki Irupatteṇkolācaṟutiyil nāṭṭiṉa puḷḷaṭikkalle yuṟṟu Itaṉinṟum cevvey meṟku ṉokki Aimpattu ṉāṟko lācaṟitiyil ṉāṭṭiṉa puḷḷaṭikkalle yuṟṟu Itaṉinṟuñ cevve teṟku ṉokkip patiṉāṟko lācaṟutiyil nāṭṭiṉa puḷḷaṭikkalle yuṟṟu
Itaṉinṟuñ cevve meṟku ṉokki Eḻupatiṉko lācaṟutiil nāṭṭiṉa puḷḷaṭikkalle yuṟṟu Itaṉinṟuñ cevve teṟku nokki Irupatteṇko lācaṟutiyil ṉāṭṭiṉa puḷḷaṭikkalle yuṟṟu Itaṉinṟuñ cevve meṟku nokkip patiṉaṟukolācaṟutiyil nāṭṭiṉa puḷḷaṭikkalle yuṟṟu Itaṉ niṉṟuñ cevvey teṟku nokki patiṉaiṅkol ceṉṟu tiruvaiyāṟuṭai yār periyapuṟattiruccuṟṟālaiyil vaṭakiḻmulaiyil niṉṟum vaṭakku nokki tiruviḻāvitiyāka
nāṟko lācaṟutiyil nāṭṭiṉa kalle yuṟṟu Ivvicai tta perunāṉkellaiyilum Akappaṭṭa nilam muṉṟe mākāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikai kiḻmukkāle mākāṇikkiḻ mukkāle Orumāvum mikitikkuṟai mai Uḷḷaṭaṅka Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟi Innilattil Akappaṭṭa meṉākkiya maramum kiṇokkiya kiṇaṟum Uṭum poṭi Āmaitavaḻnta teppeṟppaṭṭatum kārāṇmai mikāṭciyum pukuvaḻi pukavumpotuvaḻi potavum pāyumvaḻi pāyavum varumvaḻi
varavum Innilattāl vanta maṉṟum kaṉṟumeypāḻum peṟuvatākavum kulaiyum kurampum ceyyātatākavum cennirk kakaviṉai ceyyātatākavum Innilattāl vantatu maṇam pukutavum piṇam pokavum cuṭukāṭu peṟuvatākavum Innilam viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmil Icainta vilaipporuḷ veli nūṟṟuk kaḻañcu poṉṉāka Innilattāl vanta poṉ muṉṉūṟṟu Eḻukaḻañce Oṉpatu mañcāṭi Ippoṉ muṉṉūṟṟeḻukaḻañce
Oṉpatu mañcāṭip poṉṉum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kai ccella Aṟakkoṇṭu vilaikku Aṟaviṟṟu poruḷ Aṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom Innilattukku Ituvey vilaiyāvaṇamum Ituvey poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭcilavolaiyum Ituveyākavum Ituvallatu peṟuporuḷmāvaṟutip poruṭcilavolai kāṭṭakkaṭava rallātārākavum Ipparicu kallu nāṭṭi Ellai terittu viṟṟukkuṭutta nilam Ippaṭiye cilālekai ceytu ko
ḷḷap peṟuvārkaḷāka Ipparicu Oṭṭi viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom lokamahāde viīśvara ttu mahāde var devakarmmi kaḷukku tiruvai yāṟuṭai yār devakarmmi kaḷom Ivai devak(ā)rmmi rājendrasiṁ havaḷaṉāṭṭup poykai yñāṭṭu nitya viṉotaccaturvvedi maṅkalattu ghaṭi kai maddhyastanā rāṉa tirupputtūraṭikaḷeṉ Ivai yeṉ ṉeḻuttu Ippari coṭṭi viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ Ittevakarmmi rājendrasiṁ havaḷanāṭṭu taṉiyūr śrīkaṇḍa rādi ttaccaturvvedi maṅkalattu maddhyasta n paḷḷituṟaiyaṉen Ivai yen
neḻuttu Ippa(ṭ)ṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruvaiyāṟṟu civabrāhma ṇan vāḷuvaṉ kuñcaramalla ṉaiyyāṟaṉen Ivai yeṉ ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruvaiyāṟṟu civabrāhma ṇan vāḷuvan Āruran śrīkaṇḍa neṉ Ivai yeṉ neḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Isthā namuṭaiya satyaśivabhi ṭāraṉen Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyār śivabrāhma ṇaṉ Ārura ṉaiyyāṟaṉāna rājarājapaṭṭaṉen Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ jananātatterinta parivārattu Orumalūruṭai yāṉ Āccan veṇkāṭaṉen Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruv AiyāHere and in the subsequent two lines, a small portion is lost in the original stone.
r śivabrāhma ṇaṉ vāḷuvaṉ civapātacittaṉ paratevaṉāna Olokamātevipaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruvai yāṟṟu taccaṉ viṉaiyābha raṇaṉ caṟppaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyār naṭṭavaṉ malla ṉariyappaṉen Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ rājendrasiṁha vaḷaṉāṭṭup poykaiñāṭṭut tevatāṉam tirunettāṉamuṭaiyār karaṇan tevaṉ tirunāvukkarai yaṉen Ippaṭi Aṟiven tiruvai yāṟuṭai yār karaṇan paṭṭālakaṉ Aiyyāṟaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ rāje- ndra ciṅkavaḷaṉāṭṭu veṇṇaiyūruṭai yāṉ māttūruṭai yāṉ Āti
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ civapuriccaṅkarapāṭiyāṉ kuṭṭi mātevaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Irājendrasiṁ havaḷanāṭṭu miṟaikkūṟṟattut tiruppaḻaṉattu tiruppaḻaṉamuṭaiyār vaṇṇak(ka)karaṇattān Appi kaṇṭanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven Irāje- ndrasiṁ havaḷanāṭṭup poykai nāṭṭut tevatāṉam tirunettānamuṭaiyār naṭṭuvaṉ cantiraṉ kūttaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ rājendrasiṁ havaḷanāṭṭup poykaināṭṭut tevatāṉam tirumaḻapāṭiuṭaiyār tevaṉ veṇkāṭaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ rājendrasiṁ ha
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ civapurivyaā pāri cāttaṉ .
Digital edition of SII 5.518 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
